title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo: get up and running with Llama 3, Mistral, Gemma, and other large language models locally.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python SDK for Ollama: chat, generate, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript SDK for Node & browsers; chat, stream, and pull models via Ollama’s REST API.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration for Ollama: use local Llama/Mistral models as LangChain LLMs or embeddings.

title: ollama-webui (ollama-webui/ollama-webui)
summary: Feature-rich web UI for Ollama: chat UI, model management, multi-user, dark mode, mobile friendly.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Interactive CLI wrapper for Ollama with chat history, syntax highlighting, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-style VS Code extension powered by local Ollama models; fully offline code completions.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal RAG template using Ollama embeddings + Chroma vector DB; ingest PDFs and chat over them.

title: ollama-discord
summary: Self-host Discord bot that streams answers from local Ollama models; slash commands and thread support.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Helm chart to deploy Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU node selector and horizontal scaling.

title: ollama-nvim
summary: Neovim plugin that sends code or prompts to Ollama and inserts responses inline; supports Llama 3 & CodeLlama.

title: ollama-embeddings
summary: Official example repo showing how to generate embeddings with Ollama for semantic search or RAG.

title: ollama-django
summary: Django app + REST API that exposes Ollama models to web clients with JWT auth and rate limits.

title: ollama-streamlit
summary: Streamlit chat UI for Ollama: side-by-side model comparison, parameter sliders, and session memory.

title: ollama-terraform
summary: Terraform module to provision GPU-enabled AWS EC2 instance with Ollama server pre-installed.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Async Rust client for Ollama’s REST API; generate, chat, pull models with tokio and serde.

title: ollama-k8s-operator
summary: Kubernetes operator that manages Ollama instances and model caches declaratively using CRDs.

title: ollama-slack
summary: Slack Bolt app that adds /ollama slash command to query local models with thread streaming.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration to use Ollama models as generators or embedders in Haystack 2.0 pipelines.

title: ollama-macos-menu
summary: Native macOS menu-bar app that starts/stops Ollama server and shows model download progress.
